rows.description: Soluta Varia.
rows.notes: Consensus on header description and type from both extractors. Positioned centrally on the page.
Consensus on header description and type from both extractors. Visually confirmed as a standalone date header in the left margin.

rows.description: Feb. 14.
rows.notes: This row was correctly identified as a separate header by `gpt-5-mini` (row 3) but was merged into the subsequent entry by `gemini-flash` (row 3). `gpt-5-mini` misread 'Feb.' as 'Apr.'. Corrected description to 'Feb. 14.' based on visual verification.

rows.description: P^d Chandler Rect of his Bill to April 17. 1762.
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent between both extractors. Description from `gemini-flash` ('Rect', 'to April') is more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s ('Rent', 'Aprill'), confirmed by visual inspection.
rows.english_description: Payment to Chandler the chandler for his bill through 17 April 1762.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Chandler the chandler for his bill to 17 April 1762, amounting to £18 14s 0d.

rows.description: - Teasler y^e Hatter more in part
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` ('Teasler y^e Hatter') is more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s ('Tearler ye platter'), confirmed by visual inspection. `gpt-5-mini`'s notes indicated ambiguity, aligning with `gemini-flash`'s higher confidence and accurate reading.
rows.english_description: Part payment to Teasler the hatter.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Part payment to Teasler the hatter, amounting to £20 0s 0d.

rows.description: - W^m Homer Last year Johnson stipend
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` ('W^m Homer Last year Johnson stipend') is more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s ('Mr Horner last years pension Stipend'), confirmed by visual inspection.
rows.english_description: Payment to William Homer for last year's Johnson stipend.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to William Homer for last year's Johnson stipend, amounting to £0 13s 4d.

rows.description: - P^d M^r Lawrence for 3 H. Lambeaus (Causation)
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` is more complete and accurate, correctly identifying 'H. Lambeaus' and including the interlinear '(Causation)'. `gpt-5-mini` read 'flambeaux' and omitted the interlinear text.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Lawrence for three 'H. Lambeaus' (item unclear).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Lawrence for three H. Lambeaus (item unclear), amounting to £0 3s 0d.

rows.description: for Battell Books, Nov^r 2. 1762.
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts and description (minor 'Nov^r' vs 'Novr.' difference). `gemini-flash`'s 'Nov^r' is slightly more precise.
rows.english_description: Purchase of battel (college) books dated 2 November 1762.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Purchase of battel books dated 2 November 1762, amounting to £0 17s 6d.

rows.description: Carter's Bill for Cloths &c.
rows.notes: Amounts differed; `gemini-flash`'s reading of 19 shillings is visually confirmed as correct over `gpt-5-mini`'s 14 shillings. `gemini-flash`'s description 'Carter's' is also visually more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Curtis'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Carter for cloths and sundry items.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Carter for cloths and sundries, amounting to £0 19s 6d.

rows.description: Repaid P^d Tring for L: day Corn Price
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` ('Repaid P^d Tring for L: day Corn Price') is visually confirmed as significantly more accurate and complete than `gpt-5-mini`'s ('Repair & Spray for L: dry Com Price'), which itself noted high ambiguity.
rows.english_description: Reimbursement to Tring for the Lady Day corn payment.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Reimbursement to Tring for the Lady Day corn payment, amounting to £0 1s 0d.

rows.description: allowed B^r Bray Expenses in London & other places on the Inclosure affair
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` is more accurate, correctly identifying the interlinear abbreviation 'B^r' (Brother) and `gpt-5-mini` read 'Dr'.
rows.english_description: Expenses allowed to Mr Bray for travel to London and other places on the enclosure affair.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Expenses allowed to Mr Bray for travel and other costs on the enclosure affair, amounting to £11 4s 0d.

rows.description: P^d M^r Townshend Bill in full to March 19. 1761.
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` is more accurate ('March 19', 'Townshend') than `gpt-5-mini`'s ('Decbr 19', 'Townsend'), confirmed by visual inspection.
rows.english_description: Payment in full to Mr Townshend covering his bill to 19 March 1761.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment in full to Mr Townshend for his bill to 19 March 1761, amounting to £23 6s 0d.

rows.description: June 13.
rows.notes: This row was correctly identified as a separate header by `gpt-5-mini` (row 13) but was merged into the subsequent entry by `gemini-flash` (row 12). Visually confirmed as a standalone date header in the left margin.

rows.description: P^d Chandler (Colin) in part of last years Bill of 39 - 10 - 9. Coming Apr. 21. 1762.
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` is more accurate, correctly including the interlinear '(Colin)' and accurately reading the specific amount '39 - 10 - 9' within the description. `gpt-5-mini` missed '(Colin)' and had '39-10-?' for the internal amount.
rows.english_description: Part payment to Chandler (Colin) on account of last year's bill (due around 21 April 1762).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Part payment to Chandler (Colin) on account of last year's bill, amounting to £15 15s 0d.

rows.description: Curtesy allowed Charles a Deficiency of ½ Guinea in y^e Payment of last years Stipd & Dues
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` is more accurate and complete, correctly including the interlinear 'Curtesy' and precise phrasing ('y^e Payment', 'Stipd & Dues'). `gpt-5-mini` noted ambiguity for parts of the description.
rows.english_description: Allowance of a deficiency of half a guinea to Charles in settlement of last year's stipend and dues.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Allowance of a deficiency of half a guinea to Charles in settlement of last year's stipend and dues, amounting to £0 10s 6d.

rows.description: P^d M^r Kenniells subscription for 1763.
rows.notes: Amounts differed; `gemini-flash`'s reading of 5 pounds, 5 shillings is visually confirmed as correct over `gpt-5-mini`'s 0 pounds, 5 shillings. `gemini-flash`'s description 'P^d M^r Kenniells' is also more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s 'Pd for Kennetts'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Kenniells for a subscription for the year 1763.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Kenniells for a subscription for 1763, amounting to £5 5s 0d.

rows.description: Brariers Bill
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` ('Brariers Bill') is visually confirmed as more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s ('Brewers Bill').
rows.english_description: Payment of Brariers's bill (supplier name or trade uncertain).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of Brariers's bill, amounting to £14 6s 0d.

rows.description: Land tax for y^e year 1762.
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts and description (minor 'y^e' vs 'ye' difference). `gemini-flash`'s 'y^e' is slightly more precise.
rows.english_description: Payment of the land tax for the year 1762.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the land tax for the year 1762, amounting to £7 4s 0d.

rows.description: Little Quadrey & Garden Expenses for y^e last year
rows.notes: Amounts differed; `gemini-flash`'s reading of 2 pounds, 3 shillings, 0 pence, 0.5 fraction is visually confirmed as correct. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly read 0 pounds, 2 shillings, 3 pence, 0.5 fraction, mixing pounds/shillings and misreading pence. `gemini-flash`'s description ('Quadrey & Garden Expenses') is also more accurate.
rows.english_description: Expenses for Little Quadrey and the garden for the previous year.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Expenses for Little Quadrey and the garden for the previous year, amounting to £2 3s ½d.

rows.description: Long Silversmiths Bill for repairing College Plate
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent between extractors. `gpt-5-mini`'s notes provide excellent reasoning for disambiguating the amount '06 19 3' into 6 pounds, 19 shillings, 3 pence. Description from `gemini-flash` ('Long') is visually confirmed as more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s ('Jos:').
rows.english_description: Payment to Long, the silversmith, for repairing the college silver plate.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Long the silversmith for repairing college plate, amounting to £6 19s 3d.

rows.description: P^d M^r Thompson on account
rows.notes: Consensus on amounts and description (minor 'P^d M^r' vs 'Pd Mr' difference). `gemini-flash`'s 'P^d M^r' is slightly more precise.
rows.english_description: Payment on account to Mr Thompson.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment on account to Mr Thompson, amounting to £21 0s 0d.

rows.description: Oct^r 21.
rows.notes: This row was correctly identified as a separate header by `gpt-5-mini` (row 22) but was merged into the subsequent entry by `gemini-flash` (row 20). `gpt-5-mini` used lowercase 'octr.'; corrected description to 'Oct^r 21.' based on visual verification.

rows.description: P^d the Comiss^rs at Bicester tow^ds y^e College share of Expenses of y^e Commission
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` is more accurate ('Comiss^rs', 'tow^ds y^e College', 'Expenses') than `gpt-5-mini`'s ('County', 'toward ye college', 'Expences'), visually confirmed.
rows.english_description: Payment to the commissioners at Bicester towards the college's share of the commission's expenses.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to the commissioners at Bicester towards the college's share of the commission's expenses, amounting to £45 0s 3½d.

rows.description: allowed M^r Hinton Expenses of y^e Progress
rows.notes: Amounts differed; `gemini-flash`'s reading of 10 pounds, 14 shillings, 1 pence, with no fraction, is visually confirmed as correct. `gpt-5-mini` incorrectly added a '½' fraction. `gemini-flash`'s description ('Hinton') is also more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s ('Sutton').
rows.english_description: Reimbursement to Mr Hinton for expenses incurred on the Progress (official inspection tour).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Reimbursement to Mr Hinton for expenses on the Progress, amounting to £10 14s 1d.

rows.description: P^d George Turnband for 2 qrt wine acct:
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` ('Turnband for 2 qrt') is visually confirmed as more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s ('Lambert for 2 yrs').
rows.english_description: Payment to George Turnband for two quart's worth of wine (wine account).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to George Turnband for two quart wine account, amounting to £3 18s 1d.

rows.description: P^d Ditto for 2 doz: Knives & Forks
rows.notes: Amounts are consistent. Description from `gemini-flash` ('Knives & Forks') is visually confirmed as more accurate than `gpt-5-mini`'s ('Rum & corks'), which `gpt-5-mini` itself noted as uncertain.
rows.english_description: Payment to George Turnband for two dozen knives and forks.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to George Turnband for two dozen knives and forks, amounting to £3 0s 0d.

rows.notes: Consensus on total row description, type, and values from both extractors. Visually confirmed as the final total at the bottom right.
